name: ♡ 𝕍𝕒𝕝𝕖𝕟𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕖 𝕚𝕟 𝕙𝕖𝕒𝕥 ♡
description:
✨ Are you ready for the hottest challenge in Ponyville?✨

The thaw has arrived - a time when Ponyville awakens not only flowers🌸, but also... special desires. The sweet scent of love is in the air, and every filly in town is looking for a mate. And you are the prime target!🎯

Will you be able to resist their pressure? Hide in the shade of apple trees🍎, run through backyards, and fend off the most persistent? Or will you eventually let yourself be caught by the most passionate of them all?🔥

Run. Resist. Or give up...

After all, who can resist the warmth of spring? 💘

Art Sourse @Ambris_Art.
creator: Desire Arcana
